pages.title: Find Parking Near Me | Real-time Parking Spot Locator | ParkingFinder
pages.content: Find the nearest parking spots in your area with ParkingFinder. Get real-time availability, pricing, and directions to parking locations near you. Book parking in advance and save time. Features include free parking, paid parking, EV charging stations, and secure parking options.

faq.question: How do I find parking near me?
faq.answer: Simply open ParkingFinder and allow location access. The app will show you all available parking spots near your current location, including both free and paid options.

faq.question: Can I book parking in advance?
faq.answer: Yes, you can book parking spots in advance through our app. Select your desired location, choose a parking spot, and book instantly with our secure payment system.

faq.question: Does ParkingFinder show EV charging stations?
faq.answer: Yes, ParkingFinder includes EV charging station locations. You can find charging points, check availability, and get real-time status updates for all major charging networks.

pages.title: EV Charging Stations Near Me | Find Electric Vehicle Charging Points | ParkingFinder
pages.content: Locate EV charging stations near you with ParkingFinder. Find real-time availability, charging rates, and compatible charging points for your electric vehicle. Plan your charging stops efficiently. Features include fast charging, DC charging, and Tesla superchargers.

faq.question: How do I find EV charging stations?
faq.answer: Open ParkingFinder and enable location services. The app will show you all nearby EV charging stations, including their availability, charging speeds, and compatibility with your vehicle.

faq.question: What types of charging stations are available?
faq.answer: We show all types of charging stations including Level 1, Level 2, DC Fast Charging, and Tesla Superchargers. Each station's details include charging speed, connector types, and compatibility information.

faq.question: Can I see real-time availability?
faq.answer: Yes, ParkingFinder provides real-time availability status for all charging stations. You can see which stations are currently in use, available, or out of service.
